iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    main
  HDRS
    "main.h"
  SRCS
    "main.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::tooling::flags
    iree::io::file_handle
    loom::src::loom::error::diagnostic
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::op_registry
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::candidate
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_backend
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_invocation
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_runtime
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::session
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::vm_invocation
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    iree-run-loom
  SRCS
    "iree-run-loom.c"
  COPTS

  DEPS
    ::main
    iree::base
    loom::src::loom::target::emit::ireevm::execution_provider
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::execution_provider
)

iree_lit_test_suite(
  NAME
    lit_test
  SRCS
    "iree-run-loom_test.txt"
  TOOLS
    ::iree-run-loom
    FileCheck
  LABELS
    "hostonly"
)

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###

if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
  iree_package_name(_IREE_RUN_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME)
  set(_IREE_RUN_LOOM_TARGET "${_IREE_RUN_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME}_iree-run-loom")
  target_compile_definitions(${_IREE_RUN_LOOM_TARGET} PRIVATE
    IREE_RUN_LOOM_HAVE_AMDGPU=1
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_IREE_RUN_LOOM_TARGET} PRIVATE
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::amdgpu::execution_provider
  )
  unset(_IREE_RUN_LOOM_TARGET)
  unset(_IREE_RUN_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME)
endif()
